evidence: run = await self.db.get(ExtractionRun, run_id); if run.stage != ExtractionRunStage.CONSENSUS.value (TOCTOU)
suggested_action: Add SELECT ... FOR UPDATE row lock after loading the run to prevent TOCTOU race where stage is checked then mutated by concurrent callers before the consensus write completes. Alternative: add a database CHECK constraint enforcing valid stage transitions.

evidence: run = await self.db.get(ExtractionRun, run_id); if run.stage not in allowed_stages (TOCTOU)
suggested_action: Add SELECT ... FOR UPDATE row lock after loading the run to prevent TOCTOU race where stage is read then mutated by concurrent stage-advance calls before the proposal write completes.

evidence: run = await self.db.get(ExtractionRun, run_id); if run.stage != ExtractionRunStage.REVIEW.value (TOCTOU)
suggested_action: Add SELECT ... FOR UPDATE row lock after loading the run to prevent TOCTOU race where stage is checked then mutated concurrently before the reviewer decision is appended.

evidence: run = await self.db.get(ExtractionRun, run_id); CONSENSUS-stage check then optimistic-lock update (TOCTOU on publish())
suggested_action: Add SELECT ... FOR UPDATE row lock in publish() to prevent a race where stage is checked then advanced by another caller before the optimistic-lock update completes.
